summary: Completed testing of Multi-League Fixtures feature - Backend fully working, Frontend Creator Console working, League Switcher visible but session persistence issues affect direct navigation

integration_issues.issue: Auth state not persisted - navigating directly to /home shows empty page. Only works after fresh login flow

action_items: Fix root _layout.tsx - remove league/create, league/join, league/join-private, league/list from Stack.Screen as they're now handled by league/_layout.tsx
Consider adding session persistence between direct URL navigations (AsyncStorage token check on page load)

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All features working but session persistence intermittent

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed leagues during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Multi-League Fixtures feature fully tested with 8/8 passing. Frontend League Switcher visible after login, Creator Console at /league/{id}/manage works for both manual (shows form) and national (shows info message) leagues. Direct URL navigation has auth state issues.

1_national_league_fixtures.details: GET /api/leagues/{id}/fixtures returns matchdays inherited from Nazionale

2_manual_league_fixtures.details: GET /api/leagues/{id}/fixtures returns only own matchdays (1 matchday, 1 match after creation)

3_create_matchday_match.details: POST /api/leagues/{id}/matchdays + POST matches works for creator. Non-owner gets 403

4_set_current_league.details: PATCH /api/profile/current-league persists and /api/home returns the set league

5_home_league_list.details: GET /api/home?league_id=X returns league + user_leagues array (26 leagues for test user)

6_frontend_league_switcher.details: League switcher dropdown visible in home with trophy icon, league name, chevron-down when user has >1 league

7_frontend_creator_console.details: Manual leagues show Giornate list with + Aggiungi button. National leagues show 'Questa lega usa le partite della Lega Nazionale' message
